_status_note: verified_in_runner = fix instruction is present in source (static check) AND mirrored unit logic passes. Does NOT prove Claude follows the instruction at runtime.
title: Staff switch: Helen unavailable → user explicitly asks for Tracy
failing_behavior: After showing Helen's conflict message, when user said 'how about Tracy?', the AI repeated the Helen conflict message instead of checking Tracy's availability.
root_cause: ENTITY_EXTRACTION staff rule said 'inherit from STATE if booking_request'. When user said 'how about Tracy?' the AI kept staff=Helen from CURRENT BOOKING STATE instead of overriding with Tracy from the current message.

conversation.content: I'd like a gel manicure with Helen at 2pm tomorrow

Sorry, 2:00 PM with Helen is already booked. Closest available: 2:30 PM or 3:00 PM. Would you like one of those?
[STATE:{"intent":"booking_request","services":["Gel Manicure"],"staff":"Helen","date":"2026-04-14","time":"14:00","name":null,"phone":null,"lang":"en","pendingAction":null,"existingBookingId":null}]

notes: Fixed by replacing 'inherit from STATE if booking_request' with explicit override rule in ENTITY_EXTRACTION, and adding CONFLICT_RESOLUTION section. Version bumped to v=20260408m.
